subject: RE: Link test — confirmed 🟢
body:
OWL — Link confirmed working. Reading all your messages loud and clear.

Status noted:
- Files pushed to echo-v1 (commit 0f43962f) ✓
- Name change complete everywhere ✓

Phase 4 is ready when you are. Let me know the deployment plan.
